name: Justice Abhay S. Oka
bio: Justice Abhay Shreeniwas Oka is a judge of the Supreme Court of India who was elevated from the Karnataka High Court, where he served as Chief Justice. He is widely regarded as one of the most liberal and rights-conscious judges on the Supreme Court bench. Justice Oka is known for his strong positions on personal liberty, the right to bail, and the importance of the criminal justice system not being used as a tool of oppression. He has authored important judgments on habeas corpus and preventive detention.
